weather._note: Set to your coordinates. Weather comes from open-meteo.com, no API key.

apps.label: STREAMING
apps._note: Jellyfin Media Player in TV mode, pointed at the Jellyfin server on your NAS.

apps.label: LIVE TV
apps._note: Same client — Jellyfin Live TV with the iptv-org M3U playlist configured server-side. Alternatively swap for hypnotix.

apps.label: MUSIC
apps._note: Feishin connected to Navidrome on the NAS. Spotify plays via spotifyd (Spotify Connect) in the background — phone is the remote.

apps.label: GAMING
apps._note: Steam Big Picture. For max smoothness wrap in gamescope: ["gamescope", "-e", "-f", "--", "steam", "-gamepadui"]

apps.label: APPS
apps._note: Reserved — point at anything (RetroArch, a browser, etc.).

apps.label: SETTINGS
apps._note: Placeholder. Swap for a settings app or a terminal of your choice.
